content.en:
"The soul path specializes in cultivating the soul, but it does not attach importance to the physical body, and this path is not perfect. However, in the future, I can combine the soul path and the physical path to create a more perfect path. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he is ready to use this replica body to walk the soul path.

Through understanding, the current soul path of this dark soul domain has developed to the level of soul ancestors, and soul ancestors are equivalent to the realm of domain ancestors.

The cultivation of the Soul Ancestor is also through soul transformation again and again, and the soul ancestor who has just been promoted, its soul strength is enough to be comparable to the soul of the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Otherwise, there would be no way to rely on soul power alone to rival the combat power of the domain ancestor.

In the following days, some Terrans began to follow the Soul Path, but there were still some Terrans who followed the previous cultivation path.

However, they found that it was difficult to improve their cultivation here by following the previous cultivation path, and even if they wanted to impact the realm of the Domain Ancestor, it was like a heavenly moat.

As a result, the half-step domain ancestors of the human race gave up the path of the domain ancestor and began to take the path of the soul ancestor.

But soon, Ye Tian discovered a problem, that is, their souls were too weak to become soul ancestors.

At this moment, not only the half-step domain ancestors of the human race were stunned, but even the supreme half-step domain ancestors of other forces were also confused.

If you can't become a soul ancestor, then how can you get more opportunities in the future, and how can you fight with the native souls of the dark soul domain?

Nowadays, there are also many half-step soul ancestors in the Dark Soul Domain, and although their strength is not strong, they are very numerous.

Once these half-step Soul Ancestors are promoted to the Soul Ancestor realm, but they can't become Soul Ancestors, they won't be able to defeat them, let alone occupy this place in the future.

"We must create a technique, rebuild the soul path, transform the body of the half-step domain ancestor of the human race, and become a half-step soul ancestor!"

Ye Tian decided.

This step is very difficult, and it can even be said to be like a moat.

But at this time, Ye Tian found that the half-step domain ancestors of many forces had come out of the Dark Soul Domain, bringing out a large number of soul path exercises.

So, Ye Tian also let the copy body come out of the Dark Soul Domain.

Subsequently, Ye Tian released the copy body, began to copy the body, and then began to use the derivation characteristics to deduce the exercises again and again.

Deducing exercises by consuming holy souls is many times faster than that of the first ancestor.

Again and again the body collapses, and the body is replicated again, and it evolves again.

In this way, the years passed, and millions of years passed in the blink of an eye.

And in the past million years, the ancestors have been deducing the exercises, so as to realize the transformation of the half-step domain ancestor into the half-step soul ancestor.

When the other ancestors had not yet completed the transformation of the exercises, Ye Tian relied on countless transformations to finally create an exercise - the Body Fusion Soul Technique!

The so-called Body Fusion Soul Technique is to transform the power of the half-step domain ancestor into soul power, so as to achieve a qualitative change in the soul, step into the realm of the half-step soul ancestor, and embark on the soul path in one fell swoop.

And Ye Tian had only created a half-step Domain Ancestor level Fusion Soul Technique, and had not yet created a Domain Ancestor level Fusion Soul Technique, so it was only suitable for a half-step Domain Ancestor.

After Ye Tian created the Body Fusion Soul Technique, he once again copied the original half-step domain ancestor body, allowing this body to return to the Dark Soul Domain.

After returning to the Dark Soul Domain, Ye Tian summoned 100,000 geniuses as the leader of 100,000 geniuses.

In the past million years, the 100,000 geniuses of the human race have not made much progress in their cultivation, and they have fallen some, but they have also obtained a large number of resources and treasures, but unfortunately their cultivation has not been improved, and they have no way to use these resources and treasures.

"The Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor has created a technique that can make us a half-step Soul Ancestor, but everyone must make an oath and not want to leak this exercise, because other forces do not have such an exercise, and once it is leaked, the advantage of our human race will be gone. "

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

One genius after another made an oath, and it was the most serious and demanding natal oath, which obtained the inheritance of the Soul Fusion Technique.

With the Body Fusion Soul Technique, the geniuses of the human race transformed into half-step soul ancestors one by one, and then used the resources and soul treasures they obtained to step into the realm of soul ancestors one after another.

After 100,000 years, all the geniuses of the human race have stepped into the realm of soul ancestors.

At this time, they can't go out, otherwise once they leave the Dark Soul Domain, they won't be able to enter.

After becoming the Soul Ancestor, the geniuses of the Terran Race began to expand their territory, and even established the power of the Temple, recruiting the native residents of the Dark Soul Domain to continuously expand their power.

With the territory, coupled with more resources, the strength of the Terran Soul Ancestors has increased very quickly.

Only millions of years have passed, and the Soul Ancestors of the Human Race have all been promoted to the top Soul Ancestor combat power, and Ye Tian's cultivation has improved the fastest, and he has already risen to the realm of the strongest Soul Ancestor.

The way of the Soul Ancestor and the way of the Domain Ancestor seem to be different, but there are still similarities, plus Ye Tiannai is the peak of the Superior Domain Ancestor, it is naturally not difficult to push back the way of the Soul Ancestor, at least before the Supreme Soul Ancestor realm, it is not difficult.

In addition, Ye Tian also created several holy techniques suitable for mixed ancestors, and a bunch of soul skills at the domain ancestor level were also created, which were enough for the human race soul ancestors to cultivate.

Dark Souls, the headquarters of the Temple.

As the master of the temple, Ye Tian summoned the Terran Soul Ancestors.

"Everyone, it's time for us to occupy a wider territory, this is a remote area of the Dark Souls Domain, and now with the strength of our human race, even if we occupy the core area, there is no problem. I'm going to plan to occupy a sacred realm in the Dark Souls Realm!"

Ye Tian planned.

"Holy Realm!"

When everyone heard about this plan, they were excited.

Even the Dao Mountain Realm only has one Sacred Realm, the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and now they are about to capture a Sacred Realm in the Dark Soul Realm, if they succeed, then the human race is equivalent to two Sacred Realms.

Subsequently, they began to plan which Holy Realm to attack.

At present, the Dark Soul Realm has dozens of Holy Realms, each of which is occupied by a large number of forces, and no single force has the right to belong to an entire Holy Realm.

Because, if you want to completely occupy a holy realm, it is too difficult.

"Let's capture the Ten Directions Saint Realm!"

Ye Tian pointed to a holy realm on the map and said.

There are many forces in the Ten Directions Sacred Realm, and after investigation by the Terrans, most of them belong to some races in the Dark Destruction Domain.

Only a small number of Terrans were left in the temple, but there were still many native soul ancestors, and these soul ancestors joined the temple when they were very weak, and they didn't know that the temple was an outsider, and even if they knew, they wouldn't have any ideas.

After all, they were all cultivated by the Temple, so naturally they would not betray the Temple.

Moreover, the Terrans did not do anything excessive, only those forces like those in the Dark Destruction Domain would aim to destroy everything, so they would be hostile, and even resisted by the Dark Sanctuary at the beginning.

Ye Tian took tens of thousands of top soul ancestors across a long distance, and it took several months to reach the core area of the Dark Soul Domain and come to the front of the Ten Directions Saint Realm.
